title: thelypteris tetragona subsp. tetragona
intro: Thelypteris tetragona subsp. tetragona, also known as the tetragona or lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris tetragona subsp. tetragona include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
